name: NEPHROS INC
summary: Nephros Inc. is a commercial-stage company that develops and markets high-performance point-of-use water filtration solutions with a core focus on medical-grade water filtration. Products include FDA 510(k)-cleared ultrafilters (0.005 micron) and microfilters (0.1 micron) for infection control and dialysis, as well as commercial filters addressing taste, odor, lead, scale, cysts, and Total PFAS reduction. Nephros serves hospitals, dialysis centers, foodservice, laboratories, manufacturing, aviation, and government facilities through direct sales and value-added reseller channels.
